title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reckitt India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reckitt India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
